summary: Dense temporal completeness requires: (1) two new Dense axioms (density GGphi->Gphi, dense_indicator neg-U(top,bot)), (2) FC-parameterized MCS infrastructure, (3) dense soundness proofs, (4) chronicle FC re-parameterization for DenselyOrdered, (5) the completeness theorem via contrapositive. Key insight: Dense-MCS implies Base-MCS, enabling reuse of existing chronicle. DenselyOrdered for chronicle subtype follows from C4 + neg-U(top,bot) at every Dense-MCS point.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive research report covering axiom additions, FC-parameterized MCS infrastructure, dense soundness, chronicle re-parameterization for DenselyOrdered instance, and dense completeness theorem architecture
